deploymentContract.publishes: main root static files to gh-pages root because GitHub Pages is configured as deploy-from-branch
deploymentContract.requiredProof: deployment-proof.json must match the source main commit on the live public URL

notes: GitHub Pages is currently treated as a branch/root deployment. Telegram/Hermes publishes data.json to main; sync-dashboard-branches.yml builds a clean gh-pages branch; verify-live-dashboard.yml must reject the old PAT/settings dashboard on the public root URL.
